testcase.name: shouldCreateSession

{"@timestamp":"2026-03-11T12:38:34.4316951-03:00","@version":"1","message":"Unexpected error occurred in scheduled task","logger_name":"org.springframework.scheduling.support.TaskUtils$LoggingErrorHandler","thread_name":"scheduler-2","level":"ERROR","level_value":40000,"stack_trace":"org.springframework.transaction.UnexpectedRollbackException: Transaction silently rolled back because it has been marked as rollback-only
